title: Complex Decisions
description: Learn to combine conditions with and, or, and comparison operators.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Sometimes you need to check multiple things at once. Like: 'Do I have enough energy AND is the crop ready?'

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Both conditions need to be true?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! That's what 'and' does. There's also 'or' - where only ONE needs to be true.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's set up some variables. Type: energy = 20

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's check if we can harvest - we need energy > 10 AND crop_ready to be true.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: With 'and', BOTH conditions must be true for the code to run!

phases.title: Using 'or'
phases.description: At least one condition must be true

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's add an else with a different check. First, add: else:

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good! Now let me explain 'or'. With 'or', only ONE condition needs to be true.

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: So 'and' = both must be true, 'or' = at least one must be true?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Here are all the comparison operators you can use:

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: == (equals), != (not equals), < (less than), > (greater than), <= (less or equal), >= (greater or equal)

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's add a check for low energy. Type: low_energy = energy < 5

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Since energy is 20, and 20 is NOT less than 5, low_energy is False!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Add a print for low_energy, then click play!

objectives.description: Click play to run your code

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: You should see 'Let's harvest!' (because both conditions are true) and 'False' (because energy is not low)!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: This is powerful! I can make really smart decisions now!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: One more quest to master conditionals!
